story_summary: A minimal fashion-reveal short spends most of its runtime showing a heather-gray garment held up against a plain wall, then cuts to a single adult female lead wearing the matching look for a brief payoff reveal.

source_sampling.method: ffmpeg representative frame extraction plus targeted frame seeks
source_sampling.notes: A single hard cut was detected at 8.133 seconds and verified with manual frame checks around the transition.

audio_notes: Audio was extracted directly from the input video into source_audio.mp3 and is used as the default Shotstack audio source. The audio was not separately transcribed.

scenes.summary: Only hands and partial forearms are visible while a heather-gray strapless knit garment is held flat toward camera against a plain warm off-white wall. The shot functions as a prolonged garment teaser before the reveal.

camera.framing: tight vertical close-up with the garment filling most of the frame and hands at the upper corners
camera.movement: locked camera with only slight hand tremble and minor fabric drift

on_screen_text: No intentional overlay text is visible; a small garment brand tag appears near the top edge of the clothing.
scenes.environment: Plain warm off-white wall with no visible furniture or props.
scenes.transformation_role: garment teaser and setup before the on-body reveal

scenes.summary: A single adult female lead appears centered against the same plain wall wearing a gray tube top, an open sheer white overshirt, and a black mini skirt, creating the payoff reveal that connects back to the teased garment.

camera.framing: centered mid-thigh portrait framing in a vertical smartphone composition
camera.movement: locked camera with only subtle body sway and fabric drift

scenes.environment: Same plain warm off-white wall and soft indoor light as scene_001.
